# Explosives
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Explosives"/]
## Explosives
Explosives are area-denial weapons: grenades, mines, demolition charges, and launcher ammunition. They punish clustered enemies, destroy cover, and clear rooms - but they are equally dangerous to the user if mishandled.
[italic]Detailed explosive listings are in development. Check back for full content.[/italic]
See [textlink="Big Guns" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Big_Guns"/] for launcher weapons that fire explosive projectiles.
